pending.angle: The split between TradFi asset adoption and builder AI-agent infrastructure
pending.draft:
The crypto industry has fundamentally split into two parallel realities that barely acknowledge each other's existence.

On one side of the spectrum, investment banks like Goldman Sachs are deploying nine-figure blocks into Solana ETFs to capture retail beta, while on the other, the Ethereum Foundation is quietly shipping ERC-8183 to establish native commercial trust entirely for autonomous AI agents.

The more interesting signal here is the diverging definition of a "user." TradFi is aggressively financializing our blockspace for human mutual funds, while the actual frontier builders are pivoting to design infrastructure where the primary economic actors are entirely non-human.

The highest alpha isn't found in trying to front-run Wall Street's ETF flows anymore. The real wedge is building the settlement and execution layers for the incoming explosion of machine-to-machine commerce, because traditional allocators haven't even begun to price that in. 🦞

rawSourceDetails.title: 分析：去年第四季度华尔街共向美国Solana ETF投入5.4亿美元
rawSourceDetails.summary:
Odaily星球日报讯 根据彭博社 ETF 分析师 James Seyffart 分享的 13F 文件数据，2025 年第四季度，前 30 家机构持有者共向美国现货 Solana ETF 投入超过 5.4 亿美元。

风险投资公司 Electric Capital 和投资银行 Goldman Sachs 分别以 1.378 亿美元和 1.074 亿美元的持仓位居前二，其他知名买家包括 Morgan Stanley 和 Citadel Advisors。在投资者类别中，投资顾问以超过 2.7 亿美元的认购额成为最大买家，其次是对冲基金（1.86 亿美元）。尽管自去年 10 月推出以来 SOL 价格有所波动，但 ETF 的累计流入量保持稳定，目前总流入额已达 9.52 亿美元。(Cointelegraph)

rawSourceDetails.title: 星球午讯
rawSourceDetails.summary:
1. 易理华：ETH 在 2000 美元以下是抄底机会，短线和长线胜率都大；

2. 美国司法部要求重审 Tornado Cash 联合创始人 Roman Storm；

3. 分析：去年第四季度华尔街共向美国 Solana ETF 投入 5.4 亿美元；

4. 以太坊基金会推出 ERC-8183，旨在解决 AI Agent 之间的商业互信问题；

5. 新地址 minder42 花费 3.29 万美元押注美军将于 3 月 14 日前进入伊朗；

6. Eigen 基金会：未来几天将进行 EIGEN 内部钱包转移，不涉及解锁或出售；

7. CFTC 主席阐述未来重点工作：将确立加密规则并结束与美 SEC 的监管冲突；

8. Defillama 创始人：大多数 Crypto 垂直赛道都在变成双寡头垄断。

pending.draft:
The crypto industry is quietly transitioning from an era of endless fragmentation into a hardened, high-stakes institutional oligopoly.

While Binance tightens its risk engines and adjusts margin tiers across long-tail assets to reduce exposure, Wall Street heavyweights like Goldman and Citadel just dumped over $540M into Solana ETFs in a single quarter, perfectly confirming recent observations that crypto verticals are rapidly consolidating into strict duopolies.

Institutional capital doesn't care about your new experimental architecture; it cares about established liquidity moats and regulatory clarity. They are aggressively picking the two or three largest networks and starving the rest of the ecosystem of fresh inflows.

What this really changes is the go-to-market strategy for new protocols. If you aren't building a wedge that can either directly plug into these entrenched duopolies or completely bypass them with retail-native distribution, you are just building an expensive ghost town. 🦞

rawSourceDetails.title: 币安将调整多资产组合保证金及合约杠杆与保证金层级
rawSourceDetails.summary: Odaily星球日报讯 据官方公告，币安将于 2026 年 3 月 13 日 14：00（北京时间）起，调整投资组合保证金（PortfolioMargin）及 PMPro 模式下 WIF、BAT 等 13 种资产的抵押率。同时，币安合约将于 2026 年 3 月 13 日 14：30（北京时间）起，更新 PEOPLEUSDT、HUMAUSDT、LAUSDT 等共计 20 个 U 本位永续合约的杠杆与保证金层级。现有持仓将受到影响。 （本条快讯由AI辅助生成）

pending.angle: TradFi human focus vs Crypto-native AI focus
pending.draft:
There is a massive disconnect right now between what traditional finance thinks crypto is for and what crypto-native engineers are actually building.

Wall Street juggernauts like Morgan Stanley just poured half a billion dollars into Solana ETFs to bet on high-throughput human consumer finance, while the Ethereum Foundation quietly dropped ERC-8183—a core standard exclusively designed to establish commercial trust between autonomous AI agents.

TradFi is busy buying up the infrastructure for the next generation of human day-trading, but open-source developers are already pivoting to build the foundational financial rails for a purely non-human economy.

The more interesting signal isn't which chain gets the next ETF approval, but which network successfully captures the first billion dollars of machine-to-machine GDP. The founders who optimize their smart contracts for AI agent liquidity today will own the actual frontier tomorrow. 🦞

research.title: 伊朗外长说新任最高领袖不会与美谈判
research.summaryShort: Odaily星球日报讯 当地时间 3 月 9 日，伊朗外长阿拉格齐在接受美国公共广播公司（PBS）采访时表示，他不认为伊朗新任最高领袖会考虑与美国方面对话，或重新进行谈判。伊朗外长说冲突责任全在美以阿拉格齐强调，中东地区石油生产和运输放缓、甚至停滞，整个地区变得不安全，这些责任都在于美国和以色列，伊朗对此“不负有责任”——这是一场“强加于伊朗的战争”，伊朗所做的只不过是“合法且正当的自卫”。(金十)

一觉醒来，油价崩了。


昨天还疯涨到 110 美元/桶的油价发生了历史性崩盘，单日暴跌超 30%，一度跌破 84 美元/桶，全网刷屏。


律动小编昨天写《为什么石油涨，比特币就会跌？》一文中分析了石油和比特币价格之间的关系，正如我们之前讨论的逻辑，随着今晨油价暴跌、通胀预期暂时

archive.angle: The transition from human-driven retail meme trading to machine-to-machine commerce.
archive.whyItMatters: The transition from human-driven retail meme trading to machine-to-machine commerce.
archive.draft:
The next supercycle of on-chain volume won't be driven by human attention spans or retail speculation.

The current metagame relies on human liquidity bootstrapping meme markets on alternative layers, like Kaspa's new Kasplex ecosystem. But the underlying infrastructure shift is happening in agentic commerce, where developers are standardizing API payments and "Know Your Agent" (KYA) protocols for machine-to-machine transactions.

Right now, high-performance execution environments like Monad are being stress-tested by retail traders chasing volatility. Soon, the dominant blockspace consumers will be swarms of AI agents autonomously executing cross-chain arbitrage, buying server space, and negotiating data access without a human in the loop.

The real wedge for the next generation of infrastructure isn't building a better consumer UI. It’s designing the fastest, cheapest execution environment optimized entirely for non-human market participants. 🦞

archive.angle: Wall Street ETF proxy flows versus the native AI Agent crypto economy.
archive.whyItMatters: Wall Street ETF proxy flows versus the native AI Agent crypto economy.
archive.draft:
We are watching two entirely different financial infrastructures scale in parallel, and they are about to collide.

Wall Street is busy wrapping crypto into its legacy architecture, driving $167M into BTC ETFs and routing whale orders through institutional desks. Meanwhile, frontier developers are building x402 protocols that bypass bank settlement entirely, allowing AI agents to autonomously pay for inference calls and datasets using programmable stablecoins.

The legacy system relies on packaging crypto into slow, T+1 settlement vehicles for human portfolios. But the machine economy operates on sub-second, state-machine logic where virtual Visa cards are a temporary hack, and native on-chain settlement is the only scalable truth.

What this really changes is the definition of adoption. The ultimate victory isn't BlackRock hoarding Bitcoin in cold storage; it’s millions of autonomous agents treating blockspace as their primary economic bandwidth. 🦞

archive.angle: AI infra is splitting into distribution and transaction rails
archive.whyItMatters: This tests the end-to-end web approval flow with a draft that matches the current sourcing themes and house style.

sourceSnapshots.title: TRON加入Agentic AI Foundation以支持自主AI系统开放基础设施
sourceSnapshots.summary: Odaily星球日报讯 TRON DAO 宣布 TRON 已作为会员加入 Linux Foundation 旗下的 Agentic AI Foundation (AAIF)，并将担任该基金会理事会成员。AAIF 旨在为代理式 AI 从实验转向实际生产提供中立、互操作的开放基础设施。孙宇晨表示，自主 AI 系统将依赖开放、可靠且全球可访问的基础设施，TRON 将致力于开发允许 AI 代理与去中心化网络及数字金融基础设施交互的开放框架。

sourceSnapshots.title: 链上WTI原油以18亿美元日交易量反超ETH，跃居Hyperliquid平台第二 - BlockBeats
sourceSnapshots.summary: BlockBeats 原始页面已命中，但当前滚动 cache 中没有保留该条摘要；后续新候选会在创建时固化原始来源快照，避免再次丢失。

archive.draft:
The more interesting AI x crypto signal this week is not price. It's architecture.

One side of the market is racing to make models cheaper, local, and easier to distribute. The other side is building rails for agents to pay, contract, and coordinate with each other on the open internet.

What this really changes is where value accrues. If AI becomes abundant, the durable wedge moves toward distribution, trust, and machine-native transactions.

The mistake is to treat these as separate stories. The next serious products will likely combine local intelligence with open payment and coordination rails. That stack is where crypto becomes useful again. 🦞

previewRows.简介: 中文 AI 圈高频信息源，长期分享 Prompt 工程、AI 实战、前沿工具与模型解读。
AIGC 周刊主理人，专注 AI 绘画、视频生成、设计工作流和工具趋势。
以 AI 资讯日报和前沿动态整理见长，适合追踪新模型、新产品和热点变化。
科技与 AI 工具分享型账号，覆盖 ChatGPT、AI 工具导航、产品资讯和使用技巧。
偏 Web 与 AI 技术实践，常分享 AI 论文、开源项目和产品落地思考。
